title: nearmiss planted-truth benchmark suite -- external tool results
description: The common format any hotspot-detection tool writes its verdict in, to be scored by benchmarks/scorer.py --results against a city's ground_truth.json. One entry per segment_id present in that city's streets.geojson; segments the tool did not evaluate may be omitted (scored as not-significant with no CI).

tool.description: Name of the tool being scored, for the scorecard/README table.

significant.description: Whether the tool flags this segment as a statistically significant hotspot.

rate.description: The tool's exposure-normalized rate estimate for this segment, if any.

rate_ci_low.description: Lower bound of the tool's confidence/credible interval on the rate, if any.

rate_ci_high.description: Upper bound of the tool's confidence/credible interval on the rate, if any.
